find_leviathan.title: Locate the Cataclysm Leviathan in a deep ocean or underwater biome

leviathan.title: Defeat the Leviathan (Cataclysm — drops guaranteed abyssal_spellweave_ingot)

subtitle.text: Magic that was forced to be still. It carries the weight of that compression.

description: The Leviathan (L Ender's Cataclysm) is an ocean-based boss
from the Cataclysm chain — fought in underwater environments.
It drops the Abyssal Spellweave Ingot — a guaranteed drop.
This is from T.O Magic 'n Extras (traveloptics: namespace),
an Iron's Spellbooks addon that integrates with Cataclysm.
The Abyssal Spellweave Ingot is required for the Magical Eye.
The Leviathan is the Ocean Mages' final remnant.
Magic that merged with the ocean completely until it had mass.
Killing the Leviathan is the Ocean Mages' consent to be inherited.
